form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 8th (Fr1) over 1730m at Gloucester Park beaten 23 m by Salsawithsierra (2:05.50) in 4yo+ NR 49 to 55 on March 31 at $71. Before that 7th (Fr2) over 1609m at Bunbury beaten 25 m by Allizee (1:56.10) in 4yo+ NR up to 45 on March 28 at $151. Cannot enthuse.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into tenth behind Swanbourne Spunk at this track over 1177m in a NR up to 55 on March 30 at $3.50. Raced better the start before that with a game effort when 3rd (Fr1) over 1609m at Bunbury, beaten 20 m by Allizee (1:56.10) in 4yo+ NR up to 45 on March 28 at $12. Better than the last run suggests; set to make amends.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr4) over 2190m at Northam, beaten 35 m by Beat The Bank (2:42.20) in 4yo+ NR up to 65 on March 10 at $126. Two runs back broke in score up and was out of position at the start 11th (Fr1) over 1730m at Gloucester Park well beaten by Como El Viento (2:02.60) in 4yo+ 0W/17 0K stake on March 6 at $61. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into ninth after a quick start, behind Dat Lovely at Gloucester Park over 1730m in a 4yo+ NR up to 49 on March 24 at $23. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind Hes A Cool Mach at this track over 1177m in a NR up to 55 on March 30 at $18. With even luck is a winning chance.
